title: SnugSMP Cobblemon
description: SnugSMP is a cozy Cobblemon survival server built around good vibes, steady progression, and a friendly community.
body:
Just press play if you have modrinth client installed :)

SnugSMP is a cozy Cobblemon survival server built around good vibes, steady progression, and a friendly community.

Catch Pokémon, build your base, earn money, level skills, and enjoy a relaxed long-term survival world at your own pace.

What we offer:

Cobblemon catching, training, and battling
Boss fights
Jobs and skills progression
Player-driven economy
Building, exploring, and chill survival gameplay
No chaos, no pay-to-win, no clutter
Weekend tournaments

• Cobblemon Fabric 1.7.3
https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon/version/kF7CvxTo

• AllTheMons
https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons

• Simple TMs
https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon

• Traveler’s Backpack
https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack/versions
